text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, December 23. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good focus area. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
